text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While practicing for our upcoming<n>concert, Mihono
Bourbon grapples<n>with the difficulty of conveying
one's<n>feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This point is only driven further home<n>when, on
her way to the stage, she<n>tries but fails to thank a
fan for<n>supporting her.
